api_id.description: Specifies the ID of the API Gateway V2 where the integration will be created; required for associating the integration with the correct API.

connection_id.description: Specifies the ID of the VPC Link or the AWS service's network connection to be used for the integration. Required if connection type is VPC_LINK.

connection_type.description: Specifies the type of network connection for the integration, such as "INTERNET" or "VPC_LINK".

content_handling_strategy.description: Specifies how to handle request payloads, either converting them to text or binary format; valid values are "CONVERT_TO_TEXT" or "CONVERT_TO_BINARY".

credentials_arn.description: ARN of the IAM role that API Gateway assumes to call the integrated service on behalf of the user. Must be specified for AWS service integrations requiring authorization.

description.description: Provides a detailed summary of the integration's purpose or functionality, aiding in API Gateway management; must be concise and relevant.

integration_method.description: Specifies the HTTP method used for the integration, such as GET, POST, DELETE, etc. Must be supported by the integrated backend service.

integration_subtype.description: Specifies the subtype of the integration, required for certain types like AWS service integrations.

integration_type.description: Specifies the type of integration, such as HTTP_PROXY, AWS_PROXY, or MOCK, required for the API Gateway integration.

integration_uri.description: URI of the backend endpoint for the integration; must be a valid URI and compatible with the integration type.

passthrough_behavior.description: Specifies how the API Gateway should handle incoming requests when the request data does not match the integration request mapping. Must be one of "WHEN_NO_MATCH", "WHEN_NO_TEMPLATES", or "NEVER".

payload_format_version.description: Specifies the payload format version for the integration, required for HTTP APIs and must be either 1.0 or 2.0.

request_parameters.description: Defines key-value pairs to map request parameters from the incoming request to the backend integration, ensuring proper routing and transformation.

request_templates.description: Defines the mapping templates for the request payload, specifying how the integration request data should be transformed before being sent to the backend.

response_parameters.description: Defines the response parameters to be passed from the backend to the API Gateway, allowing customization of response headers, query strings, or status codes.

template_selection_expression.description: Specifies the selection expression for choosing an integration template, used for request payload mapping.

timeout_milliseconds.description: Specifies the maximum timeout in milliseconds for an integration request to complete, ranging from 50 to 30000.

tls_config.description: "Specifies the TLS configuration for the integration, including requirements for server name verification."
